name: Oatmeal Sesame Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water, applesauce, brown sugar, cinnamon, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Stir in the sesame seeds, oats, whole-wheat flour, bread flour, and yeast until well mixed.
3. Place the mixture into a greased baking pan.
4. Push the Start button on your German I oven.
5. Bake for Small Page 61 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
